title:
PROMPT 039: Rupee/Dollar Sign вЂ” Financial Services India

CANVAS: 1080Г—1080px (1:1)
DURATION: 3.0s | LOOP: No
SVG: Rupee в‚№ symbol (7 paths: vertical stroke, top horizontal bar, second horizontal bar, lower diagonal bar вЂ” styled as large display symbol) вЂ” centered 540Г—540px, 220px tall

Plus surrounding frame: 
Outer circle (stroke only): 360px diameter, centered
Inner decorative ring: 340px diameter, dashed stroke
4 small ornamental diamond shapes at N/S/E/W on circle

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #FFFBEB (very light warm gold)
Rupee symbol fill: #D97706 (amber gold)
Rupee symbol stroke: #92400E (dark amber, 2px)
Outer circle stroke: #D97706 (3px)
Inner dashed ring stroke: #FCD34D (light gold, 2px, dashes 8px)
Diamond ornaments fill: #D97706
Background gradient: radial from #FEF3C7 center to #FDE68A edges

VISUAL LAYOUT:
в‚№ symbol large, centered. Circle frame around it. Decorative diamonds at cardinal points.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (3.0s total):
0вЂ“0.4s: Outer circle draws clockwise (dashoffset 100%в†’0%, ease-out).
0.4вЂ“0.6s: Inner dashed ring fades in (opacity 0в†’1.0, ease-out). Diamond ornaments appear (scale 0в†’1.0, spring, 0.05s stagger Nв†’Eв†’Sв†’W).
0.6вЂ“1.0s: Rupee vertical stroke draws downward (dashoffset 100%в†’0%, ease-out).
1.0вЂ“1.2s: Top horizontal bar draws leftв†’right (ease-out).
1.2вЂ“1.35s: Second horizontal bar draws (slight stagger).
1.35вЂ“1.5s: Diagonal descending bar draws.
1.5вЂ“1.9s: Full в‚№ symbol revealed. Scales 1.0в†’1.08в†’1.0 (confidence pulse, spring).
1.9вЂ“2.3s: Gold shimmer scan across symbol (diagonal white highlight strip, opacity 0в†’0.5в†’0, ease-in-out).
2.3вЂ“2.7s: Outer circle rotates 15В° (ease-in-out, subtle embellishment).
2.7вЂ“3.0s: Hold.

EASING CURVES:
- Stroke draw: ease-out
- Symbol pulse: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
- Shimmer: ease-in-out
- Circle rotate: ease-in-out
